name: Sales Forecasting Model (Python, TensorFlow)
description: Led a team in the TE AI Cup Competition, achieving a high accuracy rate in predicting 18-month sales forecasts using 500 external indicators, demonstrating strong data modeling and machine learning skills.

name: WalkMeHome (Flutter, CockroachDB)
description: Designed and developed a real-time mobile application for BoilerMake Hackathon, enabling precise geolocation services for seamless user movement visualization on a map. Integrated CockroachDB backend with Flutter frontend for optimal performance.

name: Purdue X NASA Lunabotics (Python, C++)
description: Developed a Python program to implement the FastSLAM algorithm, allowing a lunar rover to efficiently map and localize itself in a simulated lunar environment. This enabled accurate mapping and position updates across complex lunar terrain.

name: Path-finding Algorithm Visualizer (JavaScript, HTML)
description: Created a website for visualizing maze-solving using A* Search Algorithm and Dijkstra’s Algorithm. Ensured the shortest path between start and end nodes, receiving positive feedback from users for its educational value.
